scripts.startbg: nohup node server.js > server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > server.pid
scripts.restart: npm run kill && npm run startbg
scripts.copy: scp -O -P 5002 server.js scanner.worker.js package.json aresvn@aresvnas.synology.me:/volume1/Shared/nas-dedup/ && scp -O -P 5002 public/app.js public/index.html public/login.html public/style.css aresvn@aresvnas.synology.me:/volume1/Shared/nas-dedup/public/
